mapper.select: SELECT r.id, r.name, r.room_type, r.created_by, r.is_archived, r.created_at, r.updated_at, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM gw_messages m WHERE m.room_id = r.id AND m.deleted_at IS NULL AND m.created_at > COALESCE(rm.last_read_at, '1970-01-01') ) AS unread_count, (SELECT m.content FROM gw_messages m WHERE m.room_id = r.id AND m.deleted_at IS NULL ORDER BY m.created_at DESC LIMIT 1) AS last_message, (SELECT m.created_at FROM gw_messages m WHERE m.room_id = r.id AND m.deleted_at IS NULL ORDER BY m.created_at DESC LIMIT 1) AS last_message_at FROM gw_chat_rooms r JOIN gw_chat_room_members rm ON rm.room_id = r.id AND rm.user_id = #{userId} WHERE r.is_archived = FALSE ORDER BY r.updated_at DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO gw_chat_rooms (name, room_type, created_by) VALUES (#{name}, #{roomType}, #{createdBy})
mapper.update: UPDATE gw_chat_rooms SET updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT rm.id, rm.room_id, rm.user_id, rm.joined_at, rm.last_read_at, rm.is_muted, u.name AS user_name, gd.name AS user_department, gp.name AS user_position FROM gw_chat_room_members rm JOIN itsm_users u ON rm.user_id = u.id LEFT JOIN gw_user_profiles gup ON gup.user_id = u.id LEFT JOIN gw_departments gd ON gup.department_id = gd.id LEFT JOIN gw_positions gp ON gup.position_id = gp.id WHERE rm.room_id = #{roomId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO gw_chat_room_members (room_id, user_id) VALUES (#{roomId}, #{userId}) ON CONFLICT (room_id, user_id) DO NOTHING
mapper.select: SELECT r.id, r.name, r.room_type, r.created_by, r.is_archived, r.created_at, r.updated_at FROM gw_chat_rooms r WHERE r.room_type = 'DIRECT' AND EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM gw_chat_room_members WHERE room_id = r.id AND user_id = #{userId1}) AND EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM gw_chat_room_members WHERE room_id = r.id AND user_id = #{userId2}) AND (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM gw_chat_room_members WHERE room_id = r.id) = 2 LIMIT 1
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO gw_messages (room_id, sender_id, content, message_type) VALUES (#{roomId}, #{senderId}, #{content}, #{messageType})
